title: Advisory Council for the Elimination of Tuberculosis | CDC NCHHSTP
text:

Secretary, U.S. Department of Health and Human Services,

Federal Tuberculosis Task Force 
The Federal TB Task Force is a coalition composed of the federal agencies and organizations involved in U.S. TB elimination efforts.
Member agencies 
Department of Health and Human Services (DHHS) 
Administration for Children & Families , DHHS 
Agency for Healthcare Research and Quality , DHHS 
Food and Drug Administration , DHHS 
Health Resources and Services Administration , DHHS 
Indian Health Service , DHHS 
National Institutes of Health , DHHS 
Office of the Assistant Secretary for Administration and Management/PSC , DHHS 
Substance Abuse and Mental Health Services Administration , DHHS 
U.S. Agency for International Development 
Department of Housing and Urban Development 
Department of Veterans Affairs 
Department of Justice 
Department of Homeland Security 
Immigration Health Services 
Uniformed Services University of the Health Sciences 
Army Medical Research Institute of Infectious Diseases 
April 1, 2024
